subject: [DEPLOY] Improve deploy.sh
commit_message:
[DEPLOY] Improve deploy.sh

Add logic to deploy required components up front
Fix storage deleteClaim on kafka

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: I6dd820a40691ba3c7e3a93510d0e5eaa9f356f9b
Issue-ID: OOM-2954

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

LGTM as far as I am concerned

Maybe the commit title should be more explicit on the improvement brought here.
This is one of the last script that still contains bashisms in OOM.
A few attempts to fix them appears in Merge Conflicts in Gerrit interfaces here.
Feel free to adapt or improve them.

Patch Set 6:

Good morning,
looking at the ONAP installation pipelines (https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation/-/pipelines) more than 50% of the installations fail in the "onap-strimzi" installation (>30 retries) in the deploy_full phase.
Should we increase the retries or what could be the reason for the failing deployment ?
